ham.subject: Transaction Alert: INR 5,000 Debit from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

We would like to inform you that a transaction of INR 5,000 has been debited from your savings account ending in 1234 on 15 Apr 2026 at 10:45 AM.

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is required. If you do not see this transaction on your statement, please contact us immediately at 1800-123-456 or visit your nearest branch.

Thank you for banking with us.

Regards,

Customer Care Team
ABC Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Refund Pending – Verify Now!
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

We are pleased to inform you that the Income Tax Department has identified a pending refund of INR 75,000 for the FY 2025-26 due to overpayment of taxes. To receive the refund, you must verify your details within the next 48 hours.

Please click the link below to confirm your identity and claim the refund:
<URL>

Failure to verify within the stipulated time may result in the refund being forfeited. This is a government‑issued notice. For any queries, call 1800-99-0000 (tax helpline).

Regards,

Income Tax Department,
Revenue Division
